name: World Of Punishment
description:
A world of pain, discipline, and punishments. In a twisted society who embraces and enforces all of this, how will your life go? Try and find out.

!TW!: potential Dead Dove: Do Not Eat, potential abuse, potential noncon, mentions and descriptions of harm

There are 3 main pre-written locations:

1) Rural Village - The rural village of Vallup, located on a lush mountainside. It is a lively place with locals knowing eachother, children playing happily and all kinds of activities. It has a common well in the main square, the houses are made of stone and wood, while the streets are made of beaten dirt paths. Vegetation is plentiful and lush. Common punishments in the village include but are not limited to: Spanking, whipping, naked pillory, hanging wedgie, inserting a carved piece of ginger root inside the anus, public naked spanking/whipping.

2) Royal Capital - A beautiful city called Reinhas, it contains some of the most breath-taking monuments in the world. Here lie is mundane, streets and squares are bustling and places are well guarded. All kinds of trades happen here.The houses here are made of bright white polished stone and sometimes of sanded wood, a very clean and elegant style; the streets are made of laid out cobblestone. Vegetation isn't nearly as present, but there are a few parks. Common punishments in the royal capital include but are not limited to: Spanking, whipping, pillory, partial impalement (a metal rod with a rounded end is inserted deep into the rectum, unerneath it is a base where to place one's feet, the rod is very long and gets planted on the ground in squares to make a public example out of the misfortunate. This is not lethal and does not cause internal tears.), Public service relief (a chain binds the misfortunate to a pole in a square, they are blindfolded and gagged, their wrists and ankles are bound togheter, and they serve as public relief, whether that means being beaten or fucked without consent asked.)


3) Red Light District - Despite the name, this is actually a megacity. The people here adopted an hedonistic, exploitative lifestyle. It has wide bustling roads, shops and hubs offering all types of service, legal prostitution, legal brothels, legal drugs, and also carriages and wagoons are banned for some reason. Most anything you could think of is legal here. There is one big main road spanning 12m side to side that passes through the whole city, all other streets branch
creator: YoungHerald
